entries.sentence: Put the vase in the middle of the table.
entries.chinese: middle = 中间；把花瓶放在桌子中间。

entries.sentence: The train arrived at midnight.
entries.chinese: midnight = 午夜；火车午夜到达。

entries.sentence: Pour some milk into the glass.
entries.chinese: milk = 牛奶；往杯子里倒些牛奶。

entries.sentence: The gap is only one millimetre wide.
entries.chinese: millimetre = 毫米；这个缝隙只有一毫米宽。

entries.sentence: He built a model of a plane.
entries.chinese: model = 模型；他做了一个飞机模型。

entries.sentence: The monster in the story lived in a cave.
entries.chinese: monster = 怪物；故事里的怪物住在洞穴里。

entries.sentence: A mosquito bit my arm.
entries.chinese: mosquito = 蚊子；一只蚊子咬了我的胳膊。

entries.sentence: His moustache made him look older.
entries.chinese: moustache = 胡子；他的胡子让他看起来更老。

entries.sentence: Add mushrooms to the soup.
entries.chinese: mushroom = 蘑菇；往汤里加蘑菇。

entries.sentence: The musician played outside the station.
entries.chinese: musician = 音乐家；音乐家在车站外演奏。

entries.sentence: Write your name on the ticket.
entries.chinese: name = 名字；把你的名字写在票上。

entries.sentence: My nephew is learning to swim.
entries.chinese: nephew = 侄子；我的侄子正在学游泳。

entries.sentence: A bird built a nest in the tree.
entries.chinese: nest = 巢；一只鸟在树上筑了巢。

entries.sentence: The ball hit the tennis net.
entries.chinese: net = 网；球打到了网球网。

entries.sentence: The office network stopped working.
entries.chinese: network = 网络；办公室网络停止工作了。

entries.sentence: The news about the storm worried us.
entries.chinese: news = 新闻；关于暴风雨的新闻让我们担心。

entries.sentence: My niece drew a picture for me.
entries.chinese: niece = 侄女；我的侄女给我画了一幅画。

entries.sentence: The nightclub opens at ten.
entries.chinese: nightclub = 夜总会；夜总会十点开门。

entries.sentence: The city has exciting nightlife.
entries.chinese: nightlife = 夜生活；这座城市有令人兴奋的夜生活。

entries.sentence: The nightmare woke him up.
entries.chinese: nightmare = 噩梦；噩梦把他惊醒了。

entries.sentence: The noise from the road was loud.
entries.chinese: noise = 噪音；路上传来的噪音很大。

entries.sentence: The meeting starts at noon.
entries.chinese: noon = 中午；会议中午开始。

entries.sentence: She wrote the address on notepaper.
entries.chinese: notepaper = 便条纸；她把地址写在便条纸上。

entries.sentence: A notice on the door said closed.
entries.chinese: notice = 通知；门上的通知写着关闭。

entries.sentence: The timetable is on the noticeboard.
entries.chinese: noticeboard = 公告板；时间表在公告板上。

entries.sentence: The novelist signed books after the talk.
entries.chinese: novelist = 小说家；小说家在讲座后签书。

entries.sentence: A police officer helped us cross the road.
entries.chinese: officer = 警官；一名警官帮我们过马路。

entries.sentence: Put one olive on each pizza.
entries.chinese: olive = 橄榄；每个披萨上放一颗橄榄。

entries.sentence: She made an omelette for breakfast.
entries.chinese: omelette = 煎蛋卷；她早餐做了一个煎蛋卷。

entries.sentence: Cut the onion into small pieces.
entries.chinese: onion = 洋葱；把洋葱切成小块。

entries.sentence: Check the opening hours before you visit.
entries.chinese: opening hours = 营业时间；参观前查看营业时间。

entries.sentence: We saw an opera at the theatre.
entries.chinese: opera = 歌剧；我们在剧院看了一场歌剧。

entries.sentence: The telephone operator connected the call.
entries.chinese: operator = 接线员；电话接线员接通了电话。

entries.sentence: Everyone gave an opinion about the plan.
entries.chinese: opinion = 意见；每个人都对计划发表了意见。

entries.sentence: The orchestra played for two hours.
entries.chinese: orchestra = 管弦乐队；管弦乐队演奏了两个小时。

entries.sentence: Put the bread in the oven.
entries.chinese: oven = 烤箱；把面包放进烤箱。

entries.sentence: The owner of the shop was friendly.
entries.chinese: owner = 主人；商店主人很友好。

entries.sentence: I bought a packet of biscuits.
entries.chinese: packet = 包；我买了一包饼干。

entries.sentence: Turn to page twenty.
entries.chinese: page = 页；翻到第二十页。

entries.sentence: The painter used bright colours.
entries.chinese: painter = 画家；画家使用了明亮的颜色。

entries.sentence: The palace garden is open to visitors.
entries.chinese: palace = 宫殿；宫殿花园向游客开放。

entries.sentence: These pants are too long for me.
entries.chinese: pants = 裤子；这条裤子对我来说太长了。

entries.sentence: Read the first paragraph again.
entries.chinese: paragraph = 段落；再读一遍第一段。

entries.sentence: Parking is free after six.
entries.chinese: parking = 停车；六点后停车免费。

entries.sentence: The parking lot was full by noon.
entries.chinese: parking lot = 停车场；停车场到中午就满了。

entries.sentence: The parrot repeated my words.
entries.chinese: parrot = 鹦鹉；鹦鹉重复了我的话。

entries.sentence: This small part belongs to the machine.
entries.chinese: part = 零件；这个小零件属于那台机器。

entries.sentence: My project partner sent the slides.
entries.chinese: partner = 搭档；我的项目搭档发来了幻灯片。

entries.sentence: You need a pass to enter the building.
entries.chinese: pass = 通行证；进入这栋楼需要通行证。

entries.sentence: Each passenger showed a ticket.
entries.chinese: passenger = 乘客；每位乘客都出示了票。
